description_long: This is a rectangular wooden toolbox reinforced with two wide, dark metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections. The box is open at the top, revealing several long-handled tools and a large, metallic hammer with an orange cap resting inside. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving the toolbox a rustic, utilitarian appearance, while the metal bands add structural strength and durability. The interior is divided into several vertical slots or compartments, each holding a different tool upright. The hammer's head is metallic and slightly weathered, suggesting frequent use. No visible handles, latches, or brand markings are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sturdy, open wooden toolbox with metal bands, containing upright tools and a large hammer. The wood grain and metal reinforcements give it a rugged, practical look.
description_view_0: The narrow end of the toolbox is visible, showing the tops of several upright tools and the hammer's head protruding from the box.
description_view_1: The long side of the toolbox is shown, clearly displaying the wood grain, metal bands, and the arrangement of tools inside, including the hammer lying at an angle.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end is visible, with the hammer's handle and orange cap more prominent, and the upright tools partially obscured.
description_view_3: The other long side of the toolbox is shown, with the hammer's head and handle clearly visible among the upright tools.
attribute_handle_type: none visible; no dedicated carrying handle is present on the exterior.
attribute_latch_mechanism: none visible; no latch or locking mechanism is present.
attribute_compartment_configuration: The interior is divided into several vertical slots or compartments, each holding a tool upright. No trays, drawers, or removable bins are visible.
